classicQuote.author: 司马迁
classicQuote.note: 真正有分量的作品，本身就会替你说话。

bookExcerpt.text: 那一点点浸过茶水的点心，忽然把整个旧日时光都唤醒了，仿佛往昔并未消失，只是沉在心底等待一个气味。
bookExcerpt.author: 马塞尔·普鲁斯特

featuredPlace.title: 哈尔施塔特
featuredPlace.summary: 湖光山色与尖顶小镇交错在一起，像一张被晨雾轻轻擦亮的明信片。

featuredPlaces.title: 哈尔施塔特
featuredPlaces.summary: 湖光山色与尖顶小镇交错在一起，像一张被晨雾轻轻擦亮的明信片。

featuredPlaces.title: 圣托里尼
featuredPlaces.summary: 蓝白山城贴着火山海岸线展开，黄昏时分的光线尤其适合短暂逃离现实。

featuredPlaces.title: 岚山竹林
featuredPlaces.summary: 风穿过竹林时像是一种很轻的回声，适合放在忙碌工作日的一角，让页面有一点呼吸感。

featuredPlaces.title: 梦莲湖
featuredPlaces.summary: 冰川湖水像调过色的蓝宝石，雪山和松林把整个画面压得既安静又辽阔。

featuredPlaces.title: 卡帕多奇亚
featuredPlaces.summary: 热气球、岩柱和柔和晨光一起出现的时候，会有一种很梦境的秩序感。

featuredPlaces.title: 马丘比丘
featuredPlaces.summary: 云雾、山脊和古城石墙叠在一起，自带一种很强的历史纵深。

items.text: 氣候變遷國際條約《巴黎協定》開放簽署，已有175個締約國簽署。
英超球隊曼聯宣佈解僱上任僅11個月的領隊大衛·莫耶斯。

international.title: EU approves €90bn loan for Ukraine as pipeline is turned on ending deadlock
international.summary: Ukraine says it has reopened the Druzhba pipeline, after months of stalemate over stalled oil supplies to neighbouring Hungary.

international.title: Lufthansa cuts 20,000 summer flights as fuel prices surge
international.summary: The airline is the latest to cut flights as the US-Israel war with Iran sends jet fuel prices soaring.

international.title: South Korean fighter jets collided due to pilots taking pictures, report finds
international.summary: One of the pilots has been fined thousands of dollars by the military to cover repair costs.

international.title: The US-Iran war is spilling into the Indo-Pacific. That could make it harder to end
Mexico officials say Teotihuacán gunman carried material related to US mass shooting
international.summary: The gunman visited the archaeological site repeatedly and appeared to act alone.

nba.title: Takeaways as Spurs lose Game 2 to Trail Blazers without Wemby
nba.summary: Here's what has stood out from the latest playoff games of the Western Conference's first round.

nba.title: Wemby concussed on hard fall in Spurs' G2 loss
nba.summary: Victor Wembanyama sustained a concussion on a hard fall during the second quarter of the Spurs' Game 2 playoff loss to the Trail Blazers.

nba.title: Edgecombe makes history with 30-10 to stun C's
nba.summary: VJ Edgecombe had 30 points and 10 rebounds while playing through pain after taking a hard fall on his back early in the game, Tyrese Maxey scored 29 p...

nba.title: Smart's defense on KD helps Lakers to 2-0 lead
nba.summary: The Rockets had Kevin Durant back for Game 2 of their first-round matchup Tuesday. But the Lakers had Marcus Smart guard him in their 101-94 win to ta...

nba.title: Scoot plays his best game of season, fuels Blazers
nba.summary: After struggling to stay healthy in 2025-26, Scoot Henderson broke out with a season-high 31 points to lead the Trail Blazers past the Spurs on Tuesda...

nba.title: Donovan leaves Bulls amid sweeping changes
nba.summary: Billy Donovan has decided to step down as head coach of the Bulls after six seasons.

sections.title: 数据存储相关
sections.description: 数据库、分布式存储、向量检索与数据系统方向的经典与高影响力论文。

items.title: The Log-Structured Merge-Tree (LSM-Tree)
items.summary: 现代写优化存储引擎的源头之一，后来的 LevelDB、RocksDB 等系统都深受它影响。

items.title: Bigtable: A Distributed Storage System for Structured Data
items.summary: Google 的经典分布式存储系统论文，奠定了大规模结构化数据服务的工程范式。

items.title: Dynamo: Amazon's Highly Available Key-value Store
items.summary: 高可用键值存储系统的代表作，对后来的 NoSQL 和云数据库设计影响极大。

sections.title: 计算机视觉相关
sections.description: 视觉基础模型、识别、检测、分割和多模态视觉方向的代表论文。

items.title: End-to-End Object Detection with Transformers
items.summary: DETR 把 Transformer 正式带入目标检测，后来一系列视觉 transformer 检测器都和它有关。

items.title: An Image is Worth 16x16 Words: Transformers for Image Recognition at Scale
items.summary: ViT 是视觉 Transformer 主线论文，后续大量视觉基础模型都建立在这条路线之上。

items.title: Learning Transferable Visual Models From Natural Language Supervision
items.summary: CLIP 是视觉语言预训练的经典代表，也是今天多模态大模型非常重要的前序工作。

sections.title: 大模型记忆库相关
sections.description: RAG、长期记忆、外部记忆和知识增强方向的高质量论文。

items.title: RETRO: Improving Language Models by Retrieving From Trillions of Tokens
items.summary: 把检索做成语言模型的一等公民，是大规模检索增强建模的重要路线。

items.title: Self-RAG: Learning to Retrieve, Generate, and Critique through Self-Reflection
items.summary: 近一代高质量 RAG 代表作，把检索、生成和反思机制串成一个统一流程。

items.title: LongMem: Scaling Language Model Context with Memory-Augmented Retrieval
items.summary: 把长期记忆和检索结合起来，比较贴近真正可用的记忆库系统设计。

sections.title: Agent 相关
sections.description: 自主智能体、工具调用、多 Agent 协同与软件 Agent 的代表论文。

items.title: Voyager: An Open-Ended Embodied Agent with Large Language Models
items.summary: 把自动课程学习、技能库和持续探索结合起来，是 embodied agent 的代表工作。

items.title: AutoGen: Enabling Next-Gen LLM Applications via Multi-Agent Conversation
items.summary: 多 Agent 协同框架的代表之一，实际工程里也被很多系统直接借鉴。

items.title: SWE-agent: Agent-Computer Interfaces Enable Automated Software Engineering
items.summary: 软件工程 Agent 的代表性论文之一，影响力和可落地性都很强。
